title: Redstone Chunk Loader
description: A all-in-one chunk loader, for your many needs. With settings for server owners.
body:
This datapack allows for you to make a redstone chunk loader, simply by placing a lodestone on top of a redstone lamp. If the Redstone lamp is powered, it will load a 3x3 chunk area with it as the center. A picture of this can be found above.

There is also another type of chunk loader i call a allay loader, if you give a allay a lodestone it becomes a chunk loader, and emits particles. This is for a situation where you need to move around a chunk loader like, a flying machine, a create mod contraption, etc.

Via the op menu, witch you can only acsses in creative with op via "/trigger op_menu", you can change the range of the chunk loader to 1x1, 3x3, or 5x5, all with the chunk loader at the center. There is also a option to limit how many chunk loaders can be on at once, allowing you to limit how many force loaded chunks there can be. This is for server owners who only want like.. 10 chunk loaders on at one time.

The datapack works fine in 1.20. It should also work in some other versions of MC. Also, i tested it, and it should work on servers unless you are doing something weired.
